0 I 3
1 OR 40
2 OR 51

4 OR 73
5 OR 04
6 OR 15
7 OR 26

Applying to 11010001
Input
I 0 = 1
I 1 = 1
I 2 = 0
I 3 = 1
I 4 = 0
I 5 = 0
I 6 = 0
I 7 = 1
Output
0 I 3 = 1
1 OR 40 = OR(I 4,I 0) = OR(0,1) = 1
2 OR 51 = OR(I 5,I 1) = OR(0,1) = 1
3 OR 62 = OR(I 6,I 2) = OR(0,0) = 0
4 OR 73 = OR(I 7,I 3) = OR(1,1) = 1
5 OR 04 = OR(I 0,I 4) = OR(1,0) = 1
6 OR 15 = OR(I 1,I 5) = OR(1,0) = 1
7 OR 26 = OR(I 2,I 6) = OR(0,0) = 0

\boxed{11101110}
